# UserTokenAuth

**Instance Property**

Your user token.

## Declaration

```swift
attribute string? UserTokenAuth;
```

## Discussion

You can obtain a user token from CloudKit Console.

For more information on authentication and user tokens see https://developer.apple.com/icloud/cloudkit/automating/
title: UserTokenAuth
